overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA IV showing protagonist Niko Bellic walking through a sunny urban commercial district, crossing streets with light traffic and passing various pedestrians and storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial sidewalk with advertising billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past street trees and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk
woman in pink top standing near the phone booth

entered.detail: large multi-story building with various advertising billboards and flags
mature deciduous tree with green foliage on the sidewalk
blue and white public telephone booth with advertisements
store with pink awning and FURNITURE signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny urban sidewalk lined with commercial buildings. A large building with billboards dominates the left side while pedestrians walk in various directions. The character passes a phone booth and continues toward the intersection.

events.description: character enters crosswalk and vehicles stop to yield

agents.ego_description: stepping off the curb and walking across the multi-lane street between stopped vehicles

notable_agents.action: brown pickup truck stopped at the crosswalk waiting for pedestrian
blue vintage sedan waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt
low-rise brick building with green canvas awnings on the opposite side

segments.scene_description: The character steps into the crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street. Vehicles including a brown pickup and blue sedan stop to yield. The scene opens up to the intersection with buildings visible on the opposite side.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with storefronts approaching community center

events.description: approaching the large Community building at the intersection
crossing the final street toward the Community building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward the prominent Community building in the distance

notable_agents.action: woman in light blue shirt walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large stone building with blue COMMUNITY signage and classical architecture
covered glass and metal walkway spanning across the street
large advertising billboard mounted above the Community building

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the new sidewalk with brick buildings and green awnings on the left. In the distance, a large Community building with a blue sign becomes visible. The character continues walking toward it, passing a pedestrian bridge overhead, and crosses the final street to approach the building entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny urban commercial district as the character progresses from a crowded sidewalk toward a specific community building. It begins with the character walking past large billboards and a phone booth on a bustling sidewalk filled with pedestrians. As the character reaches the intersection, the view opens up to a multi-lane street where a brown pickup and blue sedan stop to yield in the crosswalk. The scene then shifts to a new sidewalk lined with brick buildings and green awnings, moving beneath a pedestrian bridge as a large community building with a blue sign emerges in the distance. Finally, the camera follows the character across one last street to arrive directly at the building's entrance.
